body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Use the latest version of ClimaLand (v0.8). The main change in this release is that ClimaLSM.jl has been renamed to ClimaLand.jl. I'll also `up` all dependencies in the meantime to make sure all our compatibilities are still valid.

note: developers of ClimaCoupler will need to update their `test/` environment by removing ClimaLSM and adding ClimaLand once this change is in

closes #609


## To-do
- [x] rename ClimaLSM to ClimaLand everywhere
- [x] up all dependencies
title: update to ClimaLand v0.8 (name change)
